Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to construct a Python dictionary representing the DECLARE model for the scenario The description says keys list of constraint types For each constraint type the value is a dictionary containing as keys the activities and as corresponding value the support 1 0 and confidence of the declarative rule

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: But for binary constraints like response precedence etc they involve pairs of activities The description says as keys the activities but likely they mean pairs

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: However we can follow the description for each key the value is a dict where keys are activities or activity pairs and values are dict with support and confidence

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We need to produce a plausible model include some constraints for each type

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Provide support confidence values maybe 1 0 and 0 9 etc

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Provide example constraints existence of IG absence of something exactly one of something init maybe IG is init For binary constraints response IG DD precedence IG DD etc

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We ll construct dictionary with all keys each containing some constraints

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: We ll format as Python code block

Name: Validation - IND
Text: Make sure to follow formatting rules code formatted with Prettier width 80 Use proper indentation
